# safegit config

show or set configuration values

## config get

get a configuration value

### Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `key` | yes | configuration key |

## config set

set a configuration value

### Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `key` | yes | configuration key |
| `value` | yes | configuration value |

## config show

show all configuration
